mapper.select: SELECT auth_group_cd AS authGroupCd , auth_group_nm AS authGroupNm FROM om_auth_group_m WHERE COALESCE(is_deleted, false) = false AND COALESCE(is_active, true) = true ORDER BY sort_seq ASC, auth_group_cd ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM om_auth_group_m WHERE auth_group_cd = #{authGroupCd} AND COALESCE(is_deleted, false) = false
